motion_and_interaction.button_primary: bg-[#25D366] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold py-4 px-8 uppercase tracking-wide transition-transform hover:scale-105 flex items-center justify-center gap-2

components_strategy.hero: Left-aligned, authoritative massive typography. Abstract dark background with 40% overlay for deep contrast. The WhatsApp CTA must be the primary anchor.
components_strategy.cards: Brutalist bento grid. 1px solid border (border-white/10), dark surface. Sharp corners. Avoid default Shadcn card padding if it constraints the grid.
components_strategy.cta_buttons: Solid #25D366, sharp corners, aggressive bold text. Always accompanied by a WhatsApp icon.
components_strategy.icons: Use lucide-react or phosphor-icons/react. Icon styles must be sharp and professional.
components_strategy.financial_impact: Use JetBrains Mono for large red numbers bleeding out, switching to green when showing the ROI of the Grocor system.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark hexagonal pattern for hero background overlay. Represents system and structure.

system_showcase.description: Sleek tech setup with glowing phone representing the automated follow-up system. Use in SOLUCAO section.

target_audience.description: Modern luxury fireplace representing the high-ticket target audience (real estate/clinics).

founder_or_persona.description: Serious business owner looking straight at camera, used for the 'Filtro' or 'Enemy' section.

sections.name: 1. HERO
sections.guidelines: Massive H1 'Você não perde dinheiro na captação. Perde na operação.' Highlight 'Perde na operação' in Red or pure White while rest is grey. Primary CTA 'Agendar Diagnóstico via WhatsApp'.

sections.name: 2. PROBLEMA
sections.guidelines: Bento grid of 'Perdas invisíveis'. Red accents. Metrics: 'Leads sem resposta', 'Follow-up inexistente', 'Clientes que somem'.

sections.name: 3. INIMIGO COMUM
sections.guidelines: Stark typography section calling out agencies that only generate leads without sales processes. High contrast, aggressive tone.

sections.name: 4. INTRODUÇÃO DA IA
sections.guidelines: Visual flow showing Lead -> IA -> Hot Lead -> Sale. Clean, practical, not tech-heavy.

sections.name: 5. IMPACTO FINANCEIRO
sections.guidelines: Highly visual calculator showing R$20K+ lost per ignored lead. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers. High contrast red vs white.

sections.name: 6. SOLUÇÃO
sections.guidelines: Introduce 'Grocor DealFlow System'. Showcase the 'system_showcase' media. Focus on Speed, Persistence, Intelligence.

sections.name: 7. BENEFÍCIOS
sections.guidelines: Grid layout highlighting: more answers, visits, proposals, sales.

sections.name: 8. COMO FUNCIONA
sections.guidelines: 4-step staggered vertical list: Diagnóstico -> Estruturação -> Implementação -> Otimização. Minimalist numbered steps.

sections.name: 9. PROVA LÓGICA
sections.guidelines: Highlight box. 'Se o sistema gerar 1 venda a mais, já paga o investimento inteiro'. High trust, perhaps a dark green border.

sections.name: 10. CTA INTERMEDIÁRIO
sections.guidelines: Centered block with 'Falar no WhatsApp' CTA button.

sections.name: 11. FILTRO
sections.guidelines: Two columns: 'Para quem é' (Green checkmarks, real estate/clinics) and 'Não é' (Red crosses, beginners).

sections.name: 12. URGÊNCIA
sections.guidelines: Darkest section. Warning that competitors are already responding faster. Warning Yellow or Red accent.

sections.name: 13. CTA FINAL
sections.guidelines: Huge footer-like CTA block. 'Agendar Diagnóstico Estratégico'. Final push to WhatsApp.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All CTAs, accordions, and interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute. e.g., 'data-testid="hero-whatsapp-cta"'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text against #0A0A0A background meets APCA contrast standards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes. Do NOT write custom CSS unless absolutely necessary.
Setup Epilogue and Manrope fonts in your layout.
ALL CALL-TO-ACTIONS MUST BE WHATSAPP LINKS. DO NOT IMPLEMENT ANY FORMS. The user explicitly requested 'apenas redirecione para whatsapp'.
Emphasize the financial loss in Red, and the solution/profit in Green.
Bento box grids must use pure CSS Grid or Tailwind grid utilities. Use p-6 or p-8 for internal padding of bordered items.
The design must feel premium, aggressive, and highly corporate-brutalist. Avoid soft, playful shadows.
Implement the 13 required sections in the exact order specified.
